#Mets got to see first hand why Zach Thornton will be an impact arm after he gets acclimated to the MLB. 

Tough first 2 IP -> b/c of a few rare defensive miscues by Senger, but it was great to see Thornton settle in & pickup his defense & post a couple zeros so his offense could

result.text:
#Mets got to see first hand why Zach Thornton will be an impact arm after he gets acclimated to the MLB. 

Tough first 2 IP -> b/c of a few rare defensive miscues by Senger, but it was great to see Thornton settle in & pickup his defense & post a couple zeros so his offense could try to climb back into it. 

Not bad for a young SP prospect -> making a road start, against the MLB leader in runs scored. 

Give him a few more starts FFS -> #Mets can afford to be patient with our top SP prospects. 

Congratulations to the Thornton Family!! 🫡

#LGM  #MetsTwitter

I’m sorry but it’s ridiculous that fans were criticizing a young player for choosing a jersey number. 

Ultimately the #Mets allowed him to suit up as #8. 

Get a grip -> him wearing #8 was not a hate crime against Gary Carter, nor his Family, nor against the Shaolin Temple.
